## v0.1.1

- Separate Build, GitHub Release, and Raycast Store publish workflows so Raycast Store publish runs only against an existing GitHub Release tag.
- Use `RAYCAST_PUBLISH_GITHUB_TOKEN_CLASSIC` as the GitHub Personal Access Token classic secret for Raycast Store publish.
- Align release management documentation with the GitHub Release and Raycast Store publish flow.
- Limit local verification to Raycast-independent extension checks.
- Expand local formatting scripts to explicitly managed source, script, documentation, manifest, and workflow files.
